info.name: Cloud Shop API Tests
info.description: Postman collection for the Cloud Shop gateway API. The default base URL is http://127.0.0.1:18080. Use the testenv profile or set accessToken to a valid JWT.\n\nDefault test data comes from db/test/*/test.sql (userId=20001, merchantId=30001, categoryId=300, spuId=50001, skuId=51001).
